tiles.name: Golden Signals Bootstrap
tiles.markdown:
# prodlab-dev golden signals

This dashboard is managed through Monaco.

Scope:
- AWS account: 140023367958
- ECS cluster: prodlab-dev-cluster
- ECS service: prodlab-dev-service
- ALB: prodlab-dev-alb

Recommended first widgets to add next through Dynatrace export/download and commit back here:
1. ALB request count
2. ALB latency
3. ALB HTTP 5xx
4. ECS CPU utilization
5. ECS memory utilization
6. Running task count
